events.title: Indiana Jones and the Raiders of the Lost Ark
events.description: Archaeologist Indiana Jones is hired by the U.S. government to find the Ark of the Covenant

events.title: Mad Max: Fury Road
events.description: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland, Max teams up with Furiosa to escape a tyrannical warlord and his army.

events.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring
events.description: A meek Hobbit from the Shire and eight companions set out on a journey to destroy the One Ring and save Middle-earth from the Dark Lord Sauron.

events.title: Terminator
events.description: A cyborg assassin sent from the future to kill a woman whose unborn son will lead humanity’s resistance against machines.

events.title: Predator
events.description: An elite military team hunted in the jungle by a deadly extraterrestrial warrior

events.title: Van Helsing
events.description: A legendary monster hunter battling Dracula and other classic creatures in Transylvania
